name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries

check-group-exclude: pmlogger_check pmlogger_daily



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream8-container reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)

7a9,11
> Dec 08 18:41:10 b4525e8a96a9 pmie[307209]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Dec 08 18:41:10 b4525e8a96a9 pmie[307209]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Dec 08 18:41:10 b4525e8a96a9 pmie[307209]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
